Vegan, Gluten Free, Sugar Free, Zero Salt, Zero Trans Fat. Discover the purity of Pintola All Natural Peanut Butter. Crafted from premium roasted peanuts, it's free from palm oil, preservatives, and artificial flavors. With 30g of protein and 9g of fiber per 100g, it's a nutritious choice for fitness enthusiasts. Indulge in its rich taste and versatility—perfect for snacks or recipes. Trusted for over a decade, Pintola guarantees quality with every jar.

value.text: Key features, expiry, usage, and more

Introducing All Natural Pintola Peanut Butter 1_kg, the perfect blend of 100% pure roasted peanuts, packed with 30g of vegan protein per serving. This non-GMO, gluten-free, and cholesterol-free nut butter is a delicious and healthy option for all peanut butter lovers. With its satisfying crunch and rich flavor, it's the ultimate guilt-free indulgence. Whether you spread it on toast, blend it into smoothies, or use it as a dip, Pintola Peanut Butter is the perfect addition to your pantry. Enjoy the goodness of peanuts without any added sugar or artificial ingredients. Fuel your body with protein-packed perfection. Pintola All Natural Peanut Butter boasts an impressive 30g of protein and 9g of dietary fiber per 100g, making it an excellent source of essential nutrients. Elevate your workouts and enjoy a gluten-free, non-GMO nut butter that aligns with your health and fitness goals. Say goodbye to added sugars without sacrificing taste. Pintola's All Natural Peanut Butter is a sugar-free indulgence, allowing you to savor the pure, unadulterated taste of premium roasted peanuts. Immerse yourself in the rich flavor and relish a delicious snack without compromising on your health. What sets Pintola apart goes beyond taste – it's about the terrific benefits packed into every jar. Whether you're a fitness enthusiast looking to maximize workout results, a busy parent seeking a wholesome snack, or someone who simply appreciates the taste of freshly ground peanuts, Pintola's Peanut Butter is the perfect choice. Manage your weight, promote muscle growth, and enjoy a delectable spread that's bursting with vitamins and minerals. Delicious anytime, anywhere. Whether you're spreading it on crisp apples or sweet dates, Pintola Peanut Butter transforms every bite into a flavorful experience. It's not just a butter; it's a delicious companion for your everyday moments, offering a quick and tasty snack that suits any occasion.

Indulge in Pintola All Natural Peanut Butter, a powerhouse of protein and fiber with zero sugar and salt. Made solely from premium peanuts, it's free from preservatives. Elevate your snacking experience with its wholesome richness, perfect for spreading, dipping, or blending into your favorite recipes. With its exceptional attributes—high protein and fiber content and absence of additives—it's more than just peanut butter. It's a nourishing choice for health-conscious individuals, delivering pure goodness in every spoonful.

value.text: Pintola has been a trusted name in the world of peanut butter for more than a decade. We take immense pride in crafting our peanut butter with the finest ingredients. Our strong relationships with the community of farmers and growers ensure quality, and our use of imported machinery, in-house laboratory, and continuous roasting technology guarantee that every jar we produce is identical in taste and quality. When you choose Pintola, you're choosing unbeatable quality.

value.text: Experience the premium taste, trust, and health benefits of Pintola

Elevate your breakfast or snack time with the delicious taste of our Pintola Peanut Butter. Made from premium roasted peanuts, it offers a rich, nutty flavor that pairs perfectly with your favorite bread, bagels, or crackers. Not only does it add a burst of flavor to your meals, but it also provides a satisfying source of protein and healthy fats to keep you fueled throughout the day. Whether you're spreading it on toast, topping your oatmeal, or dipping fruits and veggies, Pintola Peanut Butter is a versatile and nutritious addition to any meal.
